acceptance_checks.then: roster/mcps.yaml versions.latest and versions.pins.stable for atlas-aci SHALL both equal 2.0.0
every digest recorded under atlas-aci versions.releases SHALL resolve to that tag on ghcr
acceptance_checks.verify_method: cmd: docker buildx imagetools inspect ghcr.io/rynaro/atlas-aci:<ver> --format {{.Manifest.Digest}} equals the recorded digest, for all 6 releases

acceptance_checks.then: cli/tests/mcp_images.bats S8-guard SHALL derive the expected digest from roster/mcps.yaml and fail when the fixture is stale
acceptance_checks.verify_method: test: bats cli/tests/mcp_images.bats; teeth proven by reverting ATLAS_ACI_PINNED to the 0.2.3 digest and observing S8-guard and S8 both fail

acceptance_checks.then: the full bats suite SHALL pass except the pre-existing doctor_deep DD-7 failure
acceptance_checks.verify_method: test: bats cli/tests/ -> 1500 ok, 1 not ok (DD-7), and DD-7 also fails on a clean tree

acceptance_checks.then: CHANGELOG.md SHALL record the bump, the three backfilled releases, and the breaking re-index requirement
acceptance_checks.verify_method: grep: CHANGELOG.md Unreleased section names 0.3.0/0.3.1/0.4.0 and the SCHEMA_EPOCH re-index

acceptance_checks.then: the atlas-aci exposes_tools list SHALL remain exactly the seven MCP tools upstream registers (export/import are CLI-only)
acceptance_checks.verify_method: cmd: compare roster exposes_tools.list against upstream enforcement.READ_ONLY_TOOLS
